name: VirnetX Holding Corp
business: VirnetX is an Internet security software company with patented cybersecurity solutions, including its flagship platform VirnetX One built on Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) principles. Its products are designed to support U.S. Department of Defense, federal government, and commercial customers requiring real-time encrypted communications and network security. It also supports international sales in compliance with U.S. export control laws.

exposures.sentence: Our flagship platform, VirnetX One , is built on Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) principles and extends our patented Secure Domain Name System (SDNS) technology to establish end-to-end encrypted communications on demand, regardless of user location or endpoint.

Our products, including VirnetX One , VirnetX Matrix , and VirnetX War Room , are designed to support U.S. Department of Defense (DoD), federal government, and commercial customers requiring real-time encrypted communications and network security.
We have entered into strategic relationships, including an investment in L2 Holdings, LLC (OmniTeq), an AI/Machine Learning (ML) solutions provider
Our technology roadmap addresses the continued growth of Internet of Things (IoT) and edge computing environments.
Our technology roadmap addresses the continued growth of Internet of Things (IoT) and edge computing environments.

We are developing a Center for Advanced Software and Hardware Integration at our Farmington, Utah facility, that incorporates artificial intelligence (AI) and digital twin technologies alongside our Software-Defined Networks (SDN) capabilities.

We are developing a federated, hybrid mesh network architecture designed with security as a foundational element.
